title: schoenus rigens
intro: Schoenus rigens, also known as black needle rush or black sedge, is a perennial plant species native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing joint pain and improving wound healing due to its antioxidant properties. Schoenus rigens can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or ointment, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
